name: Character Library
description: Manage reusable AI character references with persistent identity, appearance details, and consistency tracking across video scenes.

page_briefs.characters: Character roster with search and filter bar at top offering text search, role chips (protagonist, supporting, extra), and consistency-score filter. Card grid shows portrait-oriented character cards with hero image, character name, role badge, project-count pill, and a small consistency indicator ring. Floating 'New Character' action appears bottom-right.
page_briefs.character-detail: Full character sheet layout with hero portrait image on the left and character attributes on the right: name, role, physical description, wardrobe notes, voice traits, and reference prompt. Below the sheet, a compact data table lists every scene the character appears in with scene number, project name, timestamp, and a consistency-score column with color-coded values.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
